title: Two Football Stars Who Became Media Bosses
summary: Gary Lineker and Gary Neville were both famous football players for England. They never played against each other, but now they are rivals in business. They have their own media companies. Lineker's company is called Goalhanger and Neville's is called The Overlap. They make videos and podcasts about football. Neville bought a popular YouTube channel to make his company bigger. Lineker's podcast will be shown on Netflix during the World Cup. Both companies make a lot of money. It is exciting to see two former footballers become media bosses.

people or companies that try to do better than each other
a show you can listen to on the internet, like a radio show
a place on YouTube where you can watch videos

background_read: Both Gary Lineker and Gary Neville played for the England national football team. Lineker played for clubs like Tottenham and Barcelona, while Neville played his whole career at Manchester United. After retiring, they became TV presenters and pundits. Now they own media companies that make content about football and other sports.
Article_Structure: WHO: Gary Lineker and Gary Neville, two famous former England football players.
WHAT: They have become rivals in the media business, each owning a company that makes football content.
WHERE: Their companies are based in the UK, but their content reaches people all over the world.
WHY: They started these businesses to share their love of football and make money.

perspectives.description: He wants to grow his company and make popular podcasts.
He wants to build the biggest football community online.
